Configuration for OpenOCD to use the Tigard V1.1 adapter with SWD transport.

# Purpose
This configuration file sets up an FTDI-based adapter for use with the SWD (Serial Wire Debug) protocol. It specifies the adapter driver as `ftdi` and selects the `swd` transport. The file configures the FTDI device with a vendor ID and product ID of `0x0403` and `0x6010`, respectively, and describes the device as "Tigard V1.1". It sets the FTDI channel to `1` and the adapter speed to `2000` kHz. The file initializes the FTDI layout with the values `0x0038` and `0x003b` and configures the `SWD_EN` signal. The `nSRST` signal configuration is commented out.
